idea.title: Weather-driven Utility Demand Spike
idea.thesis: Extreme temperature deviations (>3 sigma from 30-year normal) drive utility peak demand and grid stress, lifting wholesale power prices and utility margins. Extreme weather increases peak load, emergency demand response costs, and pricing power for utilities.
data_sources: Open-Meteo daily temperature and humidity for US grid zones
idea.signal_logic: When area-weighted US temperature deviation exceeds 3 sigma from historical norm for that date
idea.entry_exit: Entry: When area-weighted US temperature deviation exceeds 3 sigma from historical norm for that date Exit: After 5 trading days or when temperature normalizes to within 1.5 sigma
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Open-Meteo daily temperature and humidity for US grid zones via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme weather events occur weekly during peak summer/winter seasons; several per month year-round.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature and humidity for US grid zones

schema.behavior: Extreme temperature deviations (>3 sigma from 30-year normal) drive utility peak demand and grid stress, lifting wholesale power prices and utility margins.

market_impact.rationale: Extreme weather increases peak load, emergency demand response costs, and pricing power for utilities.

trade_logic.entry: When area-weighted US temperature deviation exceeds 3 sigma from historical norm for that date
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or when temperature normalizes to within 1.5 sigma

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Extreme weather events occur weekly during peak summer/winter seasons; several per month year-round.

idea.title: Weekly Rise In Google Trends For Home Solar Panel Repair Signals Green Energy Sector Rebound
idea.thesis: Increasing searches reflect rising consumer investment and stress in solar energy equipment maintenance. Higher maintenance demand signals sustained consumer interest in renewable energy assets.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home solar panel repair'
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLE if weekly search interest rises 25% above 6-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLE if weekly search interest rises 25% above 6-week average Exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home solar panel repair' via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar repair searches spike seasonally and in response to weather or subsidy news.

schema.idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends for 'home solar panel repair' signals green energy sector rebound

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home solar panel repair'

schema.behavior: Increasing searches reflect rising consumer investment and stress in solar energy equipment maintenance.

market_impact.rationale: Higher maintenance demand signals sustained consumer interest in renewable energy assets.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLE if weekly search interest rises 25% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if interest falls below 10% above baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Solar repair searches spike seasonally and in response to weather or subsidy news.

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Energy Bill Shock Signals Utilities Sector Stress
idea.thesis: Rising energy bill shock searches indicate increasing consumer cost pressure affecting utilities. Consumer cost stress reduces discretionary spending and can pressure utilities demand growth.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly searches for 'energy bill shock'
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLU if weekly search interest rises 30% above 12-week average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLU if weekly search interest rises 30% above 12-week average Exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if search interest falls below 15% above baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly searches for 'energy bill shock' via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy cost shocks are common in winter and summer months with volatile fuel prices.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'energy bill shock' signals utilities sector stress

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 weeks or if search interest falls below 15% above baseline

idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.

idea.title: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Emergency Vehicle Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Sector
idea.thesis: Rising emergency vehicle repair searches signal increased consumer spending on urgent maintenance. Higher urgent repair demand supports industrial equipment and automotive services.
data_sources: Google Trends daily searches for 'emergency vehicle repair'
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLI if daily searches rise 50% above 14-day average
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLI if daily searches rise 50% above 14-day average Exit: Exit after 7 days or if searches fall below 20% above baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily searches for 'emergency vehicle repair' via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle repair emergencies spike frequently due to accidents and breakdowns.
